methods.name: digimat.mbio.mbio.MBIO.resolveIpAliasToIpAddress
documentation:
Try to resolve the given interface name to an ip address (eth0, eth0:1, 192.168.139.7, ...)
Use Digimat OS4/CPU internal scripts (i.e. getipeth0)

methods.name: digimat.mbio.mbio.MBIO.interface
documentation: IP address of the MBIO network interface (declared in the config file)

methods.name: digimat.mbio.mbio.MBIO.network
documentation: Network (i.e 192.168.1.0/24) corresponding to the MBIO LAN interface (declared in the config file)

documentation: Try to find a LinkNotifier and call RAZCONFIG (proof must be YESIAMSURE)

methods.name: digimat.mbio.mbio.MBIO.stop
documentation: Stop the MBIO processor. Shoud be called before exiting to shutdown tasks

methods.name: digimat.mbio.mbio.MBIO.resetHalted
documentation: Reset (restart) all tasks and gateways that are halted

methods.name: digimat.mbio.mbio.MBIO.halt
documentation: Halt (pause) all tasks and gateways. A restart is done with reset()

documentation: Start a device discover on all gateways

methods.name: digimat.mbio.mbio.MBIO.topvalues
documentation: Return the MBIOValues given by it's key using value.match() sorted by number of notifyCount

methods.name: digimat.mbio.mbio.MBIO.errorvalues
documentation: Return the MBIOValues with error flag active

classes.name: digimat.mbio.meteosuisse.MBIOTaskMeteoSuisse
documentation: tre200s0     °C             température de l'air à 2 m du sol; valeur instantanée
rre150z0     mm             précipitation: sommation sur 10 minutes
sre000z0     min            durée d'ensoleillement; sommation sur 10 minutes
gre000z0     W/m²           rayonnement global; moyenne sur 10 minutes
ure200s0     %              humidité de l'air relative à 2 m su sol; valeur instantanée
tde200s0     °C             point de rosée à 2 m du sol; valeur instantanée
dkl010z0     °              direction du vent; moyenne sur 10 minutes
fu3010z0     km/h           vitesse du vent; moyenne sur 10 minutes
prestas0     hPa            pression atmosphérique à l'altitude de la station (QFE); valeur instantanée
pp0qffs0     hPa            pression atmosphérique réduite au niveau de la mer (QFF); valeur instantanée
pp0qnhs0     hPa            pression atmosphérique réduite avec l'atmosphère standard (QNH); valeur instantanée
ppz850s0     gpm            altitude géopotentielle de la surface de 850 hPa; valeur instantanée
ppz700s0     gpm            altitude géopotentielle de la surface de 700 hPa; valeur instantanée
dv1towz0     °              direction du vent vectorielle; instrument 1; moyenne sur 10 minutes
fu3towz0     km/h           vitesse du vent, tour; moyenne sur 10 minutes
fu3towz1     km/h           rafale (intégration 1 s), tour; maximum
uretows0     %              humidité de l'air relative tour; valeur instantanée

classes.name: digimat.mbio.vplc.VIO
documentation: During the onInit() phase, the task pre-declares inputs
During the onLoad() phase, a ref (mbio-value, constant) is looked for each predeclared value
A mbio-value is declared for each input which is still unlinked after the load phase

classes.name: digimat.mbio.value.MBIOValue

methods.name: digimat.mbio.value.MBIOValue.isManaged
documentation: Return True if the value is writable and seems to be managed (value written not too long ago)

methods.name: digimat.mbio.value.MBIOValue.signalNotified
documentation: The value has been sent to the notifiers (CPU)
manager->refresh() retrieve I/O state and call value.updateValue(state)
and call value.notify() if needed (queue values updates notifications in MBIO for dispatching)
will set value._toReachValue (value.toreachValue) and call value.signalSync()
manager->sync() checks value.isPendingSync(), update I/O and call value.clearSync()
Note: a write don't update the value.value, which will be updated by the refresh process.
If the value isn't auto refreshed, use value.clearSyncAndUpdateValue() instead of .clearSync()
In the manager->sync() a device->signalRefresh() is automatically called after a manager->sync() to
FIXME: the value managed attribute (init) means that it's .manager() has to be called
This has nothing to do with the .isManaged() flag that indicates if this value is actively written by the CPU
